productDisplayName: Puma Men's Excurse White Spectrum Blue Shoe
description: These casual shoes named Excurse from puma with stitched accents comes with tape lining on the toe box for reinforcement. These shoes are sturdy and stylish. Team them up with smart casuals for outings with friends.UpperVulcanised leather and synthetic upper with tape lining on toeCentral lacing system for customised FitEmbossed brand logo outside the heel cupMidsoleLightly cushioned footbedShock absorbing EVA midsole for shock absorptionOutsoleTextured rubber outsole with pivot point below the big toe moundMulti directional flex grooves enhancing the flexible movement of the feet
